sglang.title: improve moe_align_kernel for deepseek v3
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
In H200
python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3 --tp 8 --trust-remote-code

python3 benchmark/gsm8k/bench_sglang.py --num-questions 2000 --parallel 2000 --num-shots 8
main branch:
Accuracy: 0.951
Invalid: 0.000
Latency: 83.593 s
Output throughput: 1676.993 token/s
pr:
0.952
I

sglang.title: Support twoshot kernel
sglang.author: yizhang2077
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

support twoshot allreduce mainly from tensorrt llm, so custom allreduce can support larger data size, correctness has been verified, performance result in a100:
test_size = 512, world_size = 2, vllm time = 0.0130ms,custom time = 0.0119ms
test_size = 4096, world_size = 2, vllm time = 0.01

sglang.title: chore: bump v0.4.1.post4

EAGLE-2
DeepSeek V3 36 tokens/s


Modifications

vllm.title: [distributed] remove pynccl's redundant stream
vllm.author: cennn
vllm.bodyExcerpt: I've streamlined the PyNcclCommunicator codebase by removing redundant stream initializations and assignments.

vllm.title: fix: [doc] fix typo
vllm.author: RuixiangMa
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I corrected the spell of sequance,the message as follows;
sequance -> sequence

vllm.title: [Frontend] Improve `StreamingResponse` Exception Handling
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SUMMARY:

Split #11737 into 2 PRs
We have been incorrectly handling errors while streaming. We have only been catching ValueError so any RuntimeErrors that occur are causing long stack traces like the below. While we have global @app.exceptionhander for RuntimeError and AsyncEngineDeadError which re

vllm.title: [distributed] remove pynccl's redundant change_state
vllm.author: cennn
vllm.bodyExcerpt: I've optimized the PyNcclCommunicator codebase by eliminating the redundant function change_state.

vllm.title: [Doc] [1/N] Reorganize Getting Started section
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The installation guide for each hardware platform is now nested under Installation to conserve space in the navigation tab.

Renamed basic installation guide to CUDA to be more explicit about the hardware platform.
Renamed CPU installation guide to x86 CPU in order to distinguish it from ARM CPUs.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Remove block size constraint
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Remove the block size constraint introduced by #11259, because only Page Attention kernel has this limitation. Other attentions such as Flash Attention doesn't have this constraint even it's also one CUDA.
cc @kzawora-intel @mgoin @simon-mo

vllm.title: [V1] Add BlockTable class
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds the BlockTable class, a thin wrapper of the GPU & CPU block table tensors. It will help reduce the complexity of the input preparation logic.
Also, BlockTable optimizes the memory movement for switching the rows of the CPU block table tensor, by tracking the actual number of blocks per

vllm.title: [mypy] Forward pass function type hints in lora
vllm.author: lucas-tucker
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds mypy type hints for forward functions on subclasses of torch.nn.Module, which returns an output due to the forward pass paired with a Parameter bias.
#3680
